derivation: Index derived from immutable Harness snapshots, edit manifests, paired replay reports, and held-out reports; it is not a serving-time memory source.

capabilities.observable_scope: Forecast cases matching the released SkillEntry observable_applicability AST; currently a narrow severe/local level-excursion signature.
instrument_dependencies: Public level-correction response was flat on part of the successful scope; this remains an F2a calibration target.
known_boundaries: Conditional severe-signature coverage only; unconditional level-shift recall is not established.
In-scope genuine-event lookalikes have not yet been fully calibrated.
Only the forecasting task and fixed Chronos downstream model are supported by M0 evidence.
